import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-basic', templateUrl: './basic.component.html', styleUrls: ['./basic.component.scss'] }) /** * 404 Basic Component */ export class BasicComponent implements OnInit { // set the current year year: number = new Date().getFullYear(); constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-sidebar-size', 'lg'); } }
